title: Tangy Toasted Kenyan Chicken Kebabs
description: A keto-friendly Kenyan dish featuring chicken, grapes, and a tangy mustard sauce, perfect for a dinner show-off
instructions: Preheat the grill to 400 degrees Fahrenheit
In a large bowl, whisk together mustard, olive oil, garlic powder, paprika, salt, and pepper
Add the chicken to the bowl and toss to coat with the mustard sauce
Thread the chicken and grapes onto skewers
Grill the kebabs for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally
While the kebabs are cooking, deglaze the grill with a little water to get the fond
Once the kebabs are cooked, brush them with the deglazed fond
Serve the kebabs hot, garnished with additional grapes if desired
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
